steps.title: Identify the purpose phrase
steps.content: The sentence says Engle uses poetry rather than prose and then needs a phrase explaining the purpose of that choice. The blank should introduce what Engle uses poetry to do.

steps.title: Use the infinitive form
steps.content: A, B, and C are finite verb forms, so they cannot smoothly express purpose after uses poetry rather than prose. The sentence needs an infinitive phrase. The answer is D.
